com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class ScanAttributesReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributesReader

  • public class ScanAttributesReader
extends java.lang.Object
    Reads attributes from requested scan job
    Since:
    API 1

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ScanAttributesReader(ScanAttributes scanAttrs)
      Constructor to create new instance of ScanAttributesReader

      Gets contrast adjustment option of the scan job

      Gets the crop mode of the scan job

      Gets the custom length of the scanned region

      Gets the media weight adjustment option of the scan job

      Gets the misfeed detection mode of the scan job

      Gets the original orientation of the scan job.

      Gets the output quality option of the scan job

      Gets the duplex mode of the scan job.

      Gets the progress dialog option

      Gets the resolution to be used for the scanned image(s).

      Gets the preview mode of system dialog

      Gets the size of the scanned region.

      Gets the sharpness adjustment option of the scan job

    • Constructor Detail

      • ScanAttributesReader

        public ScanAttributesReader(ScanAttributes scanAttrs)
        Constructor to create new instance of ScanAttributesReader
        Parameters:
        scanAttrs - The scan attributes used to construct this.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Since:
        API 1

    • Method Detail

      • getColorMode

        public ScanAttributes.ColorMode getColorMode()
        Gets the color mode of the scan job.
        Returns:
        color mode

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.ColorMode.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getPlex

        public ScanAttributes.Duplex getPlex()
        Gets the duplex mode of the scan job.
        Returns:
        duplex mode

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.Duplex.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getDestination

        public ScanAttributes.Destination getDestination()
        Gets the destination of the scan job.
        Returns:
        destination for scanned files

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.Destination.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getOrientation

        public ScanAttributes.Orientation getOrientation()
        Gets the original orientation of the scan job.
        Returns:
        original orientation

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.Orientation.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getScanSize

        public ScanAttributes.ScanSize getScanSize()
        Gets the size of the scanned region.
        Returns:
        scan size type.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.ScanSize.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getCustomLength

        public java.lang.Float getCustomLength()
        Gets the custom length of the scanned region
        Returns:
        custom length in inches.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [2.9, 34.0].

        Since:
        API 1

      • getCustomWidth

        public java.lang.Float getCustomWidth()
        Gets the custom width of the scanned region
        Returns:
        custom width in inches.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [2.16, 8.5].

        Since:
        API 1

      • getDocumentFormat

        public ScanAttributes.DocumentFormat getDocumentFormat()
        Gets the output format of the scanned image(s).
        Returns:
        the output format of the scanned image(s), as a string.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.DocumentFormat.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getResolution

        public ScanAttributes.Resolution getResolution()
        Gets the resolution to be used for the scanned image(s).
        Returns:
        the resolution to be used for the scanned image(s).

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.Resolution.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getScanPreview

        public ScanAttributes.ScanPreview getScanPreview()
        Gets the preview mode of system dialog
        Returns:
        selected scan preview option

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.ScanPreview.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getFolderName

        public java.lang.String getFolderName()
        Gets folder name to be stored scanned image(s).
        Returns:
        folder path

        • Return can be null if the scan preview is null
        • Return can be null if the scan preview is empty

        Since:
        API 1

      • getBackgroundCleanup

        public ScanAttributes.BackgroundCleanup getBackgroundCleanup()
        Gets the option of background cleanup
        Returns:
        selected background cleanup option

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.BackgroundCleanup.

        Since:
        API 1

      • getContrastAdjustment

        public ScanAttributes.ContrastAdjustment getContrastAdjustment()
        Gets contrast adjustment option of the scan job
        Returns:
        selected contrast adjustment option

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.ContrastAdjustment.

        Since:
        API 1

        Gets darkness adjustment option of the scan job
        Returns:

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from ScanAttributes.DarknessAdjustment.
